frameworks.title: Digital Sovereignty Charter
frameworks.summary: Foundational legal framework defining digital rights, jurisdiction, and enforcement mechanisms for Aetheria.

frameworks.title: Citizen Data Protection Act
frameworks.summary: Comprehensive data protection framework ensuring citizen privacy, consent mechanisms, and breach response protocols.

frameworks.title: Digital Dispute Resolution Protocol
frameworks.summary: Structured mediation and arbitration process for digital disputes between citizens, nodes, and governance bodies.

cases.title: Citizen-203 v. Ministry of Infrastructure: Compute Allocation Dispute
cases.summary: Ruled that opaque compute allocation violates Charter Article 7 equal protection. Ministry ordered to publish transparent criteria within 60 days.

cases.title: Ministry of Security v. Citizen-312: Node Operator License Revocation
cases.summary: Revocation upheld. Strict liability for consensus violations affirmed. Pre-revocation hearing satisfied due process under Charter Article 5.

cases.title: Citizen-445 v. Treasury: Quarterly Audit Mandamus
cases.summary: Writ of mandamus sought to compel quarterly audits under Charter Article 9. Awaiting judicial determination on self-executing Charter provisions.

protocols.title: Emergency Response Activation Protocol
protocols.summary: Tiered activation framework for digital emergencies, defining authority levels, notification chains, and citizen protection measures.

protocols.title: Digital Rights Protection Framework
protocols.summary: Mechanisms for protecting citizen digital rights including access, expression, association, and property in digital environments.

protocols.title: Cross-Jurisdictional Cooperation Protocol
protocols.summary: Framework for cooperation with external legal jurisdictions, evidence sharing, and mutual recognition of digital governance decisions.
